summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Niche Trend Intelligence Copilot. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% test success rate. Frontend core functionality working but has ResizeObserver runtime errors causing UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications - causing webpack dev server overlay to intercept pointer events
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents button clicks and UI interactions intermittently

passed_tests: POST /api/trends endpoint with all 5 niches (Coding, Finance, Fitness, Gaming, Education)
POST /api/analyse endpoint with Gemini AI integration
Fetch trends button and loading states
Video cards display and click functionality
Error handling for missing niche selection
Responsive design on desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Core functionality works but has runtime errors

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix ResizeObserver runtime errors in React development environment. The webpack dev server overlay is intercepting pointer events causing UI interaction failures. This appears to be related to React component resize handling.
